title: Environment and climate policy
explanation:
Environment and climate policy

  • emissions, renewable, sustainability, biodiversity, drought
  • carbon footprint, ecosystem, conservation, mitigation
  • verbs: recycle, conserve, emit, adapt

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The city plans to cut carbon ____ by forty per cent. | *emissions | receipts | platforms
Solar and wind power are examples of ____ energy. | *renewable | disposable | temporary
Long ____ can destroy crops and threaten water supplies. | *droughts | deadlines | discounts
Protecting ____ is essential for healthy ecosystems. | *biodiversity | publicity | furniture

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: Companies are trying to reduce their carbon ____.  | footprint
Governments must invest in climate ____ strategies. | mitigation
The national park was created for wildlife ____.  | conservation
An ____ can collapse if key species disappear. | ecosystem
We should ____ more plastic instead of throwing it away. | recycle

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Long-term ____ requires changes in production and consumption. | *sustainability | competition | negotiation
Factories should ____ fewer harmful gases. | *emit | donate | interrupt
Coastal cities must ____ to rising sea levels. | *adapt | complain | depart
We need stronger laws to ____ natural habitats. | *conserve | advertise | persuade
